channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Why Iran believes it can outlast the US
item.description: Iran is preparing for deeper US escalation while insisting it’s winning. Can this war end before it widens?

item.title: Qatar says ‘ready to help’ with US-Iran negotiations
item.description: Qatari Foreign Ministry spokesperson Majed al-Ansari says Qatar is “ready to help” with US-Iran negotiations.

item.title: Trump attacks NATO allies as pressure mounts over Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Alan Fisher explains what Trump’s latest criticism of US allies means.

item.title: Qatar says Iran’s attacks on neighbours crossed ‘many red lines’
item.description: Iranian attacks on Qatar are having a 'catastrophic effect on the relationship between the two countries', Doha says.

item.title: Iran will play World Cup games in US despite war, FIFA’s Infantino says
item.description: The chief of global football's governing body says US-Israeli war on Iran will not affect scheduling of 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Where to invest during Iran war? Ask – or don’t – Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf
item.description: Iran’s parliamentary speaker is using X to shape market sentiment, blending war messaging with financial signalling.

item.title: War on Iran: US’s history of making other nations pay for conflicts
item.description: White House says Trump could ask Arab nations to bear the cost of the Iran war.

item.title: Cancer drug facility, religious site hit in Israeli-US strikes on Iran
item.description: The Iranian government said the company's drug production line has been damaged, as no diplomatic solution is in sight.

item.title: Will China join Pakistan-led efforts to mediate US-Iran peace?
item.description: Pakistan's Deputy PM Ishaq Dar visits China after Islamabad talks to broker negotiations between the US and Iran.

item.title: US defence secretary says next few days in Iran war will be ‘decisive’
item.description: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth warned the coming days of the war with Iran will be ‘decisive.'
